category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an editor of encrypted files; official SOPS docs describe secrets and encrypted-file management.
display_name_sources: Official getsops.io site expands SOPS as Secrets OPerationS and uses the uppercase display name.
docs_sources: Official SOPS documentation is hosted on getsops.io/docs/.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SOPS docs/README describe editing encrypted files and managing secrets through a command-line tool.
